## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (a function returned wrong output)
- [ ] New function or module

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added for all new/changed behaviour
- [ ] Tests use real Urdu words (not placeholder text)
- [ ] JS package updated
- [ ] C# package updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @urdu-tools/core test` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @urdu-tools/core build` succeeds without TypeScript errors
- [ ] `docs/` updated if public API changed
